data.description: GameStop CEO says he is considering a major public company acquisition – WSJ.

data.title: Bybit's market share increased in 2025 despite a $1.5 billion hack. Top 10 exchange trading volumes grew by 7.6% on average.
data.description: In 2025, Bybit saw an increase in market share despite experiencing a $1.5 billion hack. During the same period, trading volumes on the top 10 exchanges collectively rose by an average of 7.6% compared to the previous year.

data.title: Munson Healthcare under investigation for data breach impacting 101,891 patient records. Jan 22, 2025 breach detected.
data.description: A law firm, Schubert Jonckheer & Kolbe LLP, is currently looking into a data breach that resulted in the unauthorized entry to the private data of 101,891 individuals who are patients of Munson Healthcare, the primary health system in Northern Michigan. The incident took place around January 22, 2025.

data.title: Guns N' Roses' "Sweet Child O' Mine" chosen as ending theme for MOBILE SUIT GUNDAM HATHAWAY film. Los Angeles, Jan. 29, 2026.
data.description: Today, it was revealed that the latest Gundam series film, MOBILE SUIT GUNDAM HATHAWAY The Sorcery of Nymph Circe, will feature "Sweet Child O' Mine" by Guns N' Roses as its ending theme song. The film is produced by Bandai Namco Filmworks and is set to captivate audiences with this legendary rock band's iconic tune. This announcement marks a significant partnership between the renowned band and the Gundam franchise, promising an exciting blend of music and action. Fans can expect a unique viewing experience as the film is accompanied by the timeless track.

data.title: LangChain's Agent Builder now available for creating natural language agents; includes experiment comparison tools and a partnership with Coinbase, reducing development time significantly.
data.description: LangChain has introduced the Agent Builder tool for creating natural language agents. The update also includes experiment comparison tools. They have recently announced a partnership with Coinbase, reducing development time significantly from quarters to days.

data.title: Major tech companies eye investing in OpenAI with funding round likely exceeding $100 billion; Amazon in talks to become leading supporter ahead of AI firm's upcoming IPO.
data.description: Amazon is in discussions to become one of the primary supporters of OpenAI as the AI firm progresses towards its goal of an initial public offering (IPO) later this year. This potential deal could make Amazon one of OpenAI's major investors, signaling a significant partnership in the AI industry. OpenAI's plans for an IPO in the upcoming year have generated substantial interest from potential backers, with Amazon's involvement poised to be a crucial development in this venture.

data.title: Brazilian equities are on the rise in 2026, with iShares MSCI Brazil ETF up 20% vs. S&P 500's 3% gain. EWZ ranks third best U.S.-listed country ETF, outperforming U.S. equities by 17% in the past month. The EWZ/SPY spread shows a potential breakout, with experts predicting further upside in Brazilian equities due to historical leverage in resource-driven bull markets.
data.description: In early 2026, Brazilian equities are on the rise, driven by high commodity prices, a weaker U.S. dollar, and a shift towards emerging markets. The iShares MSCI Brazil ETF (EWZ) has surged by 20% this month, significantly outperforming the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY) which gained less than 3% during the same period. This 17% difference represents EWZ's strongest one-month outperformance against U.S. equities in over four years. Data from CountryETFTracker ranks EWZ as the third top-performing U.S.-listed country ETF, falling behind only iShares MSCI Peru and Global Exposure ETF (EPU) at 26%, and i Shares MSCI South Korea ETF (EWY). The EWZ/SPY spread has broken its long-term downtrend, suggesting a potential technical breakout and potentially attracting more investment into Brazilian equities. Historically, during the last major commodity supercycle from October 2002 to May 2008, Brazilian equities outperformed the S&P 500 by over 1,000%, highlighting their historical connection to commodity-driven bull markets. Market experts foresee further growth in Brazilian equities.

data.title: Market focuses on timing of Federal Reserve's rate cut. Banks and homebuilders may benefit from lower rates. Effective timing key for stocks. Banks face income pressure due to deposit costs and slowed loan growth. Lower rates may stabilize net interest margins.
data.description: Market attention is focusing on the Federal Reserve's potential interest rate cuts and their implications for equity leadership. The Fed may ease its policy stance if inflation eases. Investors are closely watching when and why the first rate cut will occur. Sectors like banks and homebuilders are sensitive to rate changes. Rates impact stock prices by influencing future earnings and credit costs. Market reactions to rate changes are usually priced in beforehand. The reason for rate cuts matters; cuts due to stable growth are good for assets, while those due to economic stress can signal trouble for cyclicals. Banks, including JPMorgan Chase and Bank of America, have faced pressure from rising deposit costs and slowing loan growth. Lower rates could stabilize their net interest margins and boost profit growth. Traders are positioning themselves in these sectors ahead of potential policy changes.

data.title: Federal Reserve meeting expected to be routine, but Powell-Trump tensions may make it otherwise. Probable no change in federal funds rate (3.50% to 3.75%) with 98% certainty. Markets predict 82% chance of no rate change in March. Powell to preside over three more meetings before term ends in May amid political pressure. Political shadow looms over Powell's final stretch as Fed Chair; Department of Justice subpoenas potentially linked to Trump administration's pressure. Fed's independence at stake.
data.description: The Federal Reserve meeting scheduled for Wednesday is forecasted to be uneventful in terms of monetary policy, with a 98% chance of the federal funds rate remaining at 3.50% to 3.75%, as indicated by CME FedWatch data. However, there is anticipation for a potentially tense press conference by Chair Jerome Powell due to political interferences and legal issues, such as subpoenas and presidential pressures, overshadowing the meeting. Looking ahead to March, there is an 82% probability of no change in rates, with only a 17% likelihood of a 25-basis-point cut. Powell will oversee the next three meetings before his term ends in May, raising concerns over the influence of politics on the Fed's decision-making process. The recent grand jury subpoenas served to the Fed by the Department of Justice, alleged to be politically motivated, have heightened these worries. Powell's statements are being closely scrutinized for signs of any political influence on monetary policy.

data.title: Dow Jones futures fall ahead of Trump Fed pick; Apple and Sandisk rise with software stocks diving. Google and Nvidia show potential.
data.description: On Thursday, there was a significant drop in software stocks, despite this, the main indexes managed to rebound above crucial levels. Google and Nvidia were in favorable buying positions. Following their earnings reports, Apple and Sandisk experienced a late surge in stock prices. Dow Jones futures saw a decline as investors awaited the announcement of Trump's Federal Reserve nominee. Apple observed a rise, Tesla experienced a notable increase, and Sandisk's stock soared.

data.title: Stocks dropped with Dow losing 400 points as UnitedHealth fell; S&P 500 hit a record high. Article on Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Today, the S&P 500 achieved a new peak, whereas small-cap stocks did not perform as strongly. Reddit faced significant losses in the stock market. The Dow Jones Industrial Average dropped by 400 points due to UnitedHealth's decline, while the S&P 500 reached a record high. This update was provided by Investor's Business Daily.
